title: Native canonical reference, lens-aware architect agent, and sync gate
description: The native-surface foundation: a canonical skills/shared/arch-lens-panel.md embedding the arch-lens fragments + documenting the CP2 synthesize and CP5 reconcile panel protocols; an additive lens/MODE section in agents/bober-architect.md; the synced .claude/agents copy; and a vitest drift gate tying the markdown to arch-lenses.ts and enforcing the agent-copy equality.

successCriteria.description: skills/shared/arch-lens-panel.md exists and embeds each of the six ARCH_LENS_CATALOG fragments verbatim (the exact strings resolveArchLensFocus returns for scalability/security/cost/operability/maintainability/reversibility) and documents (a) the CP2 synthesis panel (generate approaches -> one lens scorer per lens bounded by maxConcurrent -> synthesize ranked winner) and (b) the CP5 reconcile panel (one lens reviewer per lens -> reconcile pass/fail, fail-closed on tie).

agents/bober-architect.md gains an additive lens/MODE section documenting MODE:full (default, unchanged — runs all 5 checkpoints as today), MODE:lens-score:<name> (CP2 — score the candidate approaches through the named arch lens, emit per-lens scores), and MODE:lens-review:<name> (CP5 — PASS/FAIL review the assembled architecture through the named lens, emit a verdict), referencing skills/shared/arch-lens-panel.md. The existing checkpoint instruction prose is unchanged (additive section only).

A vitest drift gate (new src/orchestrator/arch-lens-panel-parity.test.ts, or an extension of the existing lens-panel-parity.test.ts) asserts (a) skills/shared/arch-lens-panel.md contains resolveArchLensFocus(lens) for each built-in arch lens, and (b) agents/bober-architect.md and .claude/agents/bober-architect.md are byte-identical.
npx tsc --noEmit, npm run build, npx eslint src/ exit 0; the full vitest suite stays green with no new failures beyond the documented pre-existing skipped baseline.

nonGoals: Do NOT wire the panel branches into skills/bober.architect/SKILL.md yet — that is sprint 5.
Do NOT copy arch-lens-panel.md into the skill's references/ yet — sprint 5.
Do NOT change the architect agent's existing checkpoint prose, identity, or the IRON LAW — the MODE section is additive only.
Do NOT modify arch-lenses.ts, synthesizer.ts, reconciler.ts, or the TS architect-agent.ts.
stopConditions: Stop when the canonical arch reference embeds all six fragments + documents both panel protocols, the architect agent has the additive MODE section, the .claude copy is byte-identical, the drift gate is green, and typecheck/build/lint/tests are green.
Stop when changes are confined to skills/shared/arch-lens-panel.md, agents/bober-architect.md, .claude/agents/bober-architect.md, and the drift-gate test.
definitionOfDone: A canonical skills/shared/arch-lens-panel.md embeds the six arch-lens fragments verbatim and documents the CP2 synthesize + CP5 reconcile protocols; agents/bober-architect.md has an additive MODE section (full default unchanged | lens-score | lens-review) referencing it; the .claude copy is byte-identical; a vitest gate ties the markdown fragments to resolveArchLensFocus and enforces the agent-copy equality; typecheck/build/lint and the full suite are green.
assumptions: Mirror skills/shared/lens-panel.md (the evaluator canonical reference) for structure, and agents/bober-evaluator.md's MODE section for the additive lens/MODE pattern.
resolveArchLensFocus (from sprint 1) is the test accessor; ARCH_LENS_CATALOG stays module-private (the drift gate uses resolveArchLensFocus, mirroring the evaluator drift gate).
The agent file-read idiom for tests is the established new URL('../../<path>', import.meta.url) + readFile pattern used by src/orchestrator/lens-panel-parity.test.ts.
generatorNotes: Read skills/shared/lens-panel.md (the evaluator canonical reference to mirror), agents/bober-evaluator.md (its additive 'Panel / Lens Mode' section — mirror the additive style), agents/bober-architect.md (FULLY — to place the MODE section without disturbing the 5-checkpoint prose), src/orchestrator/arch-lenses.ts (copy the exact fragments verbatim), and src/orchestrator/lens-panel-parity.test.ts (the drift-gate idiom). STEP 1: create skills/shared/arch-lens-panel.md — embed the six resolveArchLensFocus fragments verbatim (one labelled block per lens) and document the CP2 synthesis-panel protocol (generate 2-3 approaches -> one lens scorer per lens, bounded by maxConcurrent -> synthesize() ranked winner + dissent) and the CP5 reconcile-panel protocol (one lens reviewer per lens -> reconcile() pass/fail, fail-closed on tie). STEP 2: add ONE additive section to agents/bober-architect.md (place it near the top of the body after the Subagent Context / IRON LAW, without modifying existing checkpoint prose): document MODE:full (default — no MODE specified, runs all 5 checkpoints exactly as the rest of the doc says), MODE:lens-score:<name> (CP2 — score the candidate approaches through resolveArchLensFocus(<name>), emit per-lens scores for synthesize), MODE:lens-review:<name> (CP5 — PASS/FAIL review the assembled architecture+ADRs through the lens, emit a verdict for reconcile), referencing skills/shared/arch-lens-panel.md. STEP 3: cp agents/bober-architect.md .claude/agents/bober-architect.md (byte-identical). STEP 4: create src/orchestrator/arch-lens-panel-parity.test.ts (or extend lens-panel-parity.test.ts): import resolveArchLensFocus; read skills/shared/arch-lens-panel.md via readFile(new URL('../../skills/shared/arch-lens-panel.md', import.meta.url),'utf-8') and assert it includes resolveArchLensFocus(lens) for each of the six lenses; read both agents/bober-architect.md and .claude/agents/bober-architect.md and assert byte-identical. Use ESM .js specifiers, import type, unicode headers. Conventional commit: bober(sprint-4): add canonical arch-lens reference + lens-aware architect agent + sync gate. GIT HYGIENE: stage only your files with explicit paths; never `git add -A`. NOTE: agents/bober-architect.md and its .claude copy may carry pre-existing uncommitted edits and are identical to each other — keep them identical. Branch: the feature branch — never main.
evaluatorNotes: Read skills/shared/arch-lens-panel.md AND src/orchestrator/arch-lenses.ts: confirm the six fragment strings match resolveArchLensFocus output character-for-character, and that both panel protocols (CP2 synthesize, CP5 reconcile/fail-closed) are documented. Read agents/bober-architect.md: confirm the MODE section is additive (git diff additive-only; full=default; existing checkpoint prose intact) and references the canonical reference. Confirm .claude/agents/bober-architect.md is byte-identical (diff directly). Run the drift gate: confirm the fragment-embedding assertions and the agent-copy equality assertion are green; reason that mutating an ARCH_LENS_CATALOG fragment without updating the markdown would fail it. Confirm NO SKILL.md/.claude/commands/TS/reducer files were touched. Run npx tsc --noEmit, npm run build, npx eslint src/ (exit 0) and the full npx vitest run (tolerate only the pre-existing skipped baseline).
